/AJW/CH1:SP 3 Y:U:ESS/REIN ORIG TC/STATES/PROB EXT:01-26-2004/RESTV//X:PAYMENT OF RESTITUTION IS SUSPENDED TO APRIL 15, 2002,//X:FAILURE OF THE DEFENDANT TO MAKE RESTITUTION PAYMENTS WILL RESULT IN THESTATE PRISON TERM IMPOSED,//X:UPON PAYMENT OF RESTITUTION, PROBATION MAY TERMINATE NOT EARLIER THAN THE ORIGINAL THREE YEAR TERM BUT MAY TERMINATE BEFORE THE EXTENDED  PROBATIONPERIOD OF JANUARY 26, 2004,/OBEY/ACCEP/

/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/CTWP:31/PROB REV/SPRISON:3 YEARS, UPPER TERM/ESS/PJ:31 DAYS YEAR/ADDL CTS:ZERO/PROB EXT:01-26-04//CTORD:FAILURE TO MAKE PAYMENT, SP TERM WILL BE IMPOSED//CO:IF BALANCE IS PAID OFF, PROBATION SHALL TERMIMATE,
CONTD SUPPL RPT /X:SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT TO SET FORTH RESTITUTION PAYMENTS,//X:DEFENDANT ORDERED TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT UPON HIS RELEASE FROM COUNTY JAIL,/SUPP:09-10-01/DOP/

/X:STATEMENT BY LOUIS PREOVOLOS,/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV//DEF:ADMITS VIOLATION OF PROBATION/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTWP:245/PJ:9 MONTHS/ADDL CTS:103/PROB EXT:01-06-2005//X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, STARTING THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH FOLLOWING THE DEFENDANT'S RELEASE AND ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE SUM OF $200,00 TO ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TO BE APPLIED AS RESTITUTION AS FOLLOWS (IN ORDER OF PRIORITY): 1) FERN FILNER $250,00;2) DARUKA AND JANICE WANIGATUNGA, AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED BY APD; 3) LOUIS PREOVOLOS $300,00 AND ALL SUBJECT TO A 10% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE ONE PAYMENT, STATE PRISON WILL BE IMPOSED,/X:MONTHLYSTATUS REPORTS (15TH OF EACH MONTH) WILL BE SCHEDULED; FAILURE TO APPEAR WILL BE CONSIDERED A VIOLATION OF PROBATION,/
/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL APPEARED AT 9:50 AM; FAILURE TO APPEAR TIMELY WILL BE ADDRESSED AT A LATER TIME,/CONTD TS DA MTR

/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT STIP/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTWP:208/SPRISON:3 YEARS, UPPER TERM/ESS/PJ:1 YEAR/ADDL CTS:106/PROB EXT:09-25-04//RESTO:FERN FILNER IN THE SUM OF $250/RESTO:DARUKA AND JANICE WANIGATUNGA/
